description: Analyze conversion funnels to track user journey through defined steps

variations.name: Basic e-commerce checkout funnel
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | analyze_funnel(
    event_column='event_name',
    user_id_column='user_id',
    funnel_steps=['home_page_view', 'product_view', 'add_to_cart', 'checkout_started', 'purchase_completed'],
    step_names=['Homepage', 'Product Page', 'Cart', 'Checkout', 'Purchase']
)

variations.name: Checkout process with time limit
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | analyze_funnel(
    event_column='page_name',
    user_id_column='session_id',
    funnel_steps=['cart_page', 'shipping_details', 'payment_info', 'review_order', 'confirmation'],
    step_names=['Cart', 'Shipping', 'Payment', 'Review', 'Confirmation'],
    max_step_time=1800
)

variations.name: Mobile app signup funnel
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | analyze_funnel(
    event_column='event_type',
    user_id_column='device_id',
    funnel_steps=['app_open', 'signup_begin', 'email_entered', 'password_created', 'profile_completed'],
    max_step_time=3600
)

variations.name: User onboarding flow
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | analyze_funnel(
    event_column='onboarding_event',
    user_id_column='user_id',
    funnel_steps=['registration', 'email_verification', 'tutorial_viewed', 'first_login', 'first_action'],
    step_names=['Register', 'Verify Email', 'Tutorial', 'Login', 'First Action']
)

variations.name: Feature purchase funnel
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | analyze_funnel(
    event_column='payment_event',
    user_id_column='customer_id',
    funnel_steps=['feature_info_view', 'price_check', 'add_payment_method', 'confirm_purchase', 'receipt_view'],
    step_names=['Info', 'Price Check', 'Payment Method', 'Confirmation', 'Receipt'],
    max_step_time=1800
)

description: Analyze funnel performance over time periods to track trends

variations.name: Weekly checkout funnel trends
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | analyze_funnel_by_time(
    event_column='event_name',
    user_id_column='user_id',
    date_column='event_timestamp',
    funnel_steps=['product_view', 'add_to_cart', 'checkout_started', 'purchase_completed'],
    step_names=['View', 'Cart', 'Checkout', 'Purchase'],
    time_period='week',
    max_periods=4
)

variations.name: Daily signup conversion trends
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | analyze_funnel_by_time(
    event_column='signup_event',
    user_id_column='visitor_id',
    date_column='event_date',
    funnel_steps=['landing_page_view', 'signup_form_view', 'email_entered', 'account_created', 'profile_completed'],
    time_period='day',
    max_periods=14
)

variations.name: Monthly subscription funnel analysis
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | analyze_funnel_by_time(
    event_column='subscription_event',
    user_id_column='user_id',
    date_column='event_timestamp',
    funnel_steps=['plan_viewed', 'trial_started', 'credit_card_added', 'trial_converted', 'renewal_occurred'],
    time_period='month',
    max_periods=3
)

variations.name: Feature adoption with datetime format
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | analyze_funnel_by_time(
    event_column='feature_event',
    user_id_column='user_id',
    date_column='event_date',
    funnel_steps=['feature_announcement_seen', 'feature_page_viewed', 'feature_tried', 'feature_repeatedly_used'],
    step_names=['Awareness', 'Interest', 'Trial', 'Adoption'],
    time_period='week',
    max_periods=12,
    datetime_format='%Y-%m-%d'
)

variations.name: Yearly e-commerce funnel trends
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | analyze_funnel_by_time(
    event_column='shopping_event',
    user_id_column='customer_id',
    date_column='event_timestamp',
    funnel_steps=['search', 'product_view', 'add_to_cart', 'checkout', 'purchase'],
    time_period='year',
    max_periods=3
)

description: Analyze funnel performance across different user segments

variations.name: Onboarding completion by user type
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | analyze_funnel_by_segment(
    event_column='event_name',
    user_id_column='user_id',
    segment_column='user_type',
    funnel_steps=['signup', 'profile_completion', 'first_connection', 'first_message_sent'],
    step_names=['Sign Up', 'Profile', 'Connection', 'Messaging'],
    min_users=100
)

variations.name: Purchase funnel by age group
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | analyze_funnel_by_segment(
    event_column='purchase_event',
    user_id_column='customer_id',
    segment_column='age_group',
    funnel_steps=['product_view', 'add_to_cart', 'checkout_begin', 'payment_info', 'order_complete'],
    min_users=50
)

variations.name: Subscription conversion by account type
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | analyze_funnel_by_segment(
    event_column='subscription_event',
    user_id_column='user_id',
    segment_column='account_type',
    funnel_steps=['pricing_page_view', 'trial_signup', 'feature_usage', 'payment_info_added', 'paid_conversion'],
    step_names=['Pricing', 'Trial', 'Usage', 'Payment', 'Conversion']
)

variations.name: Checkout funnel by device type
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | analyze_funnel_by_segment(
    event_column='checkout_step',
    user_id_column='visitor_id',
    segment_column='device_type',
    funnel_steps=['cart_view', 'checkout_click', 'shipping_info', 'payment_info', 'review_order', 'complete_purchase'],
    min_users=25
)

variations.name: Marketing channel conversion analysis
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | analyze_funnel_by_segment(
    event_column='user_event',
    user_id_column='visitor_id',
    segment_column='marketing_channel',
    funnel_steps=['landing_page_view', 'signup_started', 'form_completed', 'email_verified', 'first_login'],
    min_users=75
)

description: Analyze user navigation paths through the funnel to identify common journeys

variations.name: Checkout process user paths
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | analyze_user_paths(
    event_column='page_name',
    user_id_column='visitor_id',
    timestamp_column='visit_timestamp',
    funnel_steps=['product_page', 'cart_page', 'shipping_page', 'payment_page', 'confirmation_page'],
    max_path_length=10,
    min_path_frequency=0.01
)

variations.name: App onboarding user journeys
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | analyze_user_paths(
    event_column='screen_name',
    user_id_column='user_id',
    timestamp_column='event_time',
    funnel_steps=['welcome_screen', 'login_screen', 'feature_tour', 'profile_setup', 'home_screen'],
    max_path_length=15,
    min_path_frequency=0.05
)

variations.name: Signup to purchase journey
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | analyze_user_paths(
    event_column='event_name',
    user_id_column='user_id',
    timestamp_column='timestamp',
    funnel_steps=['signup_completed', 'first_purchase'],
    max_path_length=20,
    min_path_frequency=0.02
)

variations.name: Product discovery to checkout
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | analyze_user_paths(
    event_column='user_action',
    user_id_column='session_id',
    timestamp_column='action_timestamp',
    funnel_steps=['search_performed', 'checkout_completed'],
    max_path_length=12,
    min_path_frequency=0.03
)

variations.name: New user to premium subscription
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | analyze_user_paths(
    event_column='event_type',
    user_id_column='user_id',
    timestamp_column='event_timestamp',
    funnel_steps=['new_user_signup', 'premium_subscription_purchase'],
    max_path_length=25,
    min_path_frequency=0.01
)

description: Get summary statistics for funnel analysis results

variations.name: Get overall funnel summary
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | analyze_funnel('event_name', 'user_id', ['step1', 'step2', 'step3'])
summary = get_funnel_summary()(cohort_pipe)

variations.name: Get conversion rate summary
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | analyze_funnel('event_name', 'user_id', ['signup', 'trial', 'purchase'])
summary = get_funnel_summary()(cohort_pipe)
print(f"Overall conversion rate: {summary['overall_conversion_rate']:.2f}%")

variations.name: Get completion time summary
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | analyze_funnel('event_name', 'user_id', ['step1', 'step2', 'step3'])
summary = get_funnel_summary()(cohort_pipe)
print(f"Average time to complete: {summary['avg_completion_time']} minutes")

variations.name: Get revenue summary
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | analyze_funnel('event_name', 'user_id', ['view', 'cart', 'purchase'])
summary = get_funnel_summary()(cohort_pipe)
print(f"Total revenue from completed funnels: ${summary['total_revenue']:,.2f}")

variations.name: Get drop-off analysis
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | analyze_funnel('event_name', 'user_id', ['signup', 'verify', 'complete'])
summary = get_funnel_summary()(cohort_pipe)
print(f"Drop-off at email verification: {summary['dropoff_at_email_verification']:.2f}%")

description: Compare funnel performance between different user segments

variations.name: Compare mobile vs desktop conversion
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | analyze_funnel_by_segment('event_name', 'user_id', 'device_type', ['step1', 'step2'])
comparison = compare_segments(
    metric_column='conversion_rate',
    baseline_segment='desktop'
)(cohort_pipe)

variations.name: Compare browser performance
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | analyze_funnel_by_segment('event_name', 'user_id', 'browser', ['step1', 'step2'])
comparison = compare_segments(
    metric_column='checkout_completion_rate',
    baseline_segment='chrome'
)(cohort_pipe)

variations.name: Compare marketing channels
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | analyze_funnel_by_segment('event_name', 'user_id', 'marketing_channel', ['step1', 'step2'])
comparison = compare_segments(
    metric_column='signup_success_rate'
)(cohort_pipe)

variations.name: Compare pricing tiers
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | analyze_funnel_by_segment('event_name', 'user_id', 'pricing_tier', ['step1', 'step2'])
comparison = compare_segments(
    metric_column='renewal_rate',
    baseline_segment='basic_tier'
)(cohort_pipe)

variations.name: Compare user types
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | analyze_funnel_by_segment('event_name', 'user_id', 'user_type', ['step1', 'step2'])
comparison = compare_segments(
    metric_column='abandonment_rate',
    baseline_segment='returning_users'
)(cohort_pipe)
